list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat(ui-ux-pro-max): Add components, layouts, effects, animations, motion, examples, and chart sections
Add sections for Components, Layouts, Effects, Animations, Motion, Examples, and Chart in the UI/UX Pro Max workflow to provide guidelines and recommendations for various UI elements and interactions. This will help improve the user experience and design consistency across the application.

MESSAGE.value:
chore(agent): update UI/UX pro max search workflow
- Updated the search order and available stacks for better usability and clarity.

feat: Add new domains, components, effects, animations, layouts, and examples
Added new domains: components, effects, animations, layouts, and examples to the search functionality to improve search results and user experience.

feat(data): add new animations and effects
Added new animations like Sticky Parallax, Marquee Scroll, Text Reveal Split, Image Reveal Mask, Magnetic Button, Cursor Follower, Scroll Progress Line, Card 3D Tilt, Stack Cards, Video Reveal and effects like Grain Texture, Mesh Gradient 2.0, Text Gradient Flow, Blurred Orb, Inner Shadow Glow, Masked Text Reveal, Chromatic Aberration, Spotlight Hover, Scroll Progress, Reflection to the existing list.

Revert "feat(data): add motion.csv with API, Type, Keywords, Code Example, Props/Options, Best For, Notes, and Docs URL columns"
This reverts commit 36d4e8bd

feat(ui-ux-pro-max): Add components, layouts, effects, animations, motion, examples, and chart sections
Add sections for Components, Layouts, Effects, Animations, Motion, Examples, and Chart in the UI/UX Pro Max workflow to provide guidelines and recommendations for various UI elements and interactions. This will help improve the user experience and design consistency across the application.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(ui-ux-pro-max): Add components, layouts, effects, animations, motion, examples, and chart sections
Add sections for Components, Layouts, Effects, Animations, Motion, Examples, and Chart in the UI/UX Pro Max workflow to provide guidelines and recommendations for various UI elements and interactions. This will help improve the user experience and design consistency across the application.
